z9Get device fence scsi switch flag from device superblock.
unknown
enable
disable
off)
is_enabled_fencescsi)
switch
retr
get_feature_switch5
z!FenceSCSIAgent.get_feature_switchc
Set device fence scsi status.
        options["--action"] = on: register key and type 5 reservation
        for given devices, giving lun protection and access right;
        options["--action"] = off: fence scsi for given devices,
        preempt remote hosts' key and cancel their lun access right.
        :param options: a diction contents options["devices"], options["--key"]
        and options["--action"]
        :returns: False - set action failed; True - set action successfully.
        r
--actionr
devicesz
Set scsi status on for %sz-Set status on failed: %s is not block device.F
--key
z'Failed to register key %s on device %s.Nz/Failed to create reservation(key=%s, device=%s)z8Failed: keys cannot be same. You can not fence yourself.z
Set scsi status off for %sz-Set status off failed: %s is not blockdevice.z%Failed to remove key %s on device %s.z#No reservation exists on device %s.z
Failed to verify %s device(s)T)
_set_keyr

        :param options: a diction contents options["devices"], options["--key"]
        :returns: on - device is under scsi lun protection for given host;
        off - device not register on for given host.
        r

z!FenceSCSIAgent.process_pool_eventc
Fence given host's lun write permission.
        Do fence scsi for given remote node to protect the LUN used by
        other active nodes.
        If can not get the leave node's key, do nothing, because other
        node might fence scsi this node already.
        r

Do fence scsi upgrade post process for upgrade not interrupt service
        New feature switch write into device super block, there are no need to
        do any process for upgrade, because the switch will not change when
        doing upgrade process.
        r
upgrade
FenceSCSIAgent.upgradec
Check upgrade process result for fence scsi.
        New feature switch write into device super block, there are no need to
        do any process for upgrade, because the switch will not change when
        doing upgrade process.
        r
